Anker’s 65W Nano USB-C Charger

Buy for $20 (Reg. $40)

What we love

This compact Anker charger is an easy upgrade if you’re looking to replace a bulky power brick with something that’s much more travel-friendly. It’s about 58% smaller than a standard 61W USB-C charger, and the foldable prongs make it easy to toss into a backpack, laptop sleeve, or even a pocket. Despite its size, this unit can deliver up to 65W of power through its USB-C port, making it capable of charging everything from laptops and tablets to the latest iPhones, which can fast charge at up to 45W.

items.title: Galaxy Z Fold 8 and Galaxy Watch 9 launch soon: Up to $1,230 off, secure your FREE credit now
items.summary:
Update 6/21: Fold 8 and Galaxy Watch 9 series lineup set to debut tomorrow – time is is running out to secure your FREE credit.

Samsung has now officially revealed its upcoming Galaxy Unpacked event where we will be seeing the launch of the new Galaxy Z Fold 8 series devices, as well as its next-generation Galaxy Watch 9, and more. You can go drop your email down for a no-commitment reservation to net yourself a FREE $30 credit that will stack with the upcoming trade-in discounts.
